title: Mogul Activation Mandate
description: Machine-checkable schema for Mogul activation mandates. Written by triggers (SessionStart, /cadence, /review, explicit), read by Mogul to determine execution scope.

actor.description: The governance office being activated and its runtime embodiment.

office.description: The governance office. Always 'mogul' for this schema.

embodiment.description: The runtime embodiment executing this mandate. cgg_runtime = Claude Code agent process. estate_runtime = external supervised process.

trigger.description: What caused this mandate to be written.

kind.description: The trigger type that generated this mandate.

source_ref.description: Path or identifier of the hook/skill/command that wrote this mandate.

tic_context.description: Tic-derived scheduling context at mandate creation time.

current_tic.description: Physical tic count at mandate creation.

review_due_tic.description: Next tic at which queue + signal scan is due.

memory_mining_due_tic.description: Next tic at which memory mining cycle is due.

ladder_audit_due_tic.description: Next tic at which ladder coherence audit is due.

deep_audit_due_tic.description: Next tic at which deep audit cycle is due.

cycle_request.description: Which governance cycles Mogul should execute.

run_now.description: List of governance cycles to execute in this activation.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of why these cycles are due or required.

conformation_ref.description: Path to the most recent conformation snapshot, or null if unavailable.

blocking_to_homeskillet.description: If true, Homeskillet waits for Mogul to complete before proceeding.

allow_subdelegation.description: If true, Mogul may delegate to subordinate agents.

runtime_truth.description: Runtime sync state at mandate creation time.

canonical_vs_installed_verified.description: Whether canonical source and installed copies were verified as in-sync before this mandate was written.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this mandate was created.
